scripts.generate: bun ../../packages/generator/bin/generator.ts --spec ../../packages/spec/openapi.yaml --output . --lang swift --examples && rm -rf generated/Sources/Pachca/GeneratedSources && mkdir -p generated/Sources/Pachca/GeneratedSources && mv swift/*.swift generated/Sources/Pachca/GeneratedSources/ && mv swift/examples.json generated/ && rmdir swift
